Ntc And Motion To Compel Further Responses ; And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-18-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:


Appearance:
Anthony J. Sperber, Esq., for Vincent Hayhurst, Plaintiff/Moving Party
Rishi N. Sherma, Esq., for Barclays Global Investors, USA, Inc., Defendant/Opposing Party.

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted with modification: Plaintiff Vincent Hayhurst's Motion To Compel Further Responses is granted and denied in part. The motion is granted, limited to documents and emails relating to the items set forth in Request No. 37. Defendant shall undertake a search based upon reasonable search terms as defined by Defendant alone or after meet and confer with Plaintiff. The allocation of costs shall be determined by the parties after meet or confer or by the court if the parties are not able to agree upon an allocation based upon the financial burden. Request No. 36 is otherwise overly broad. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied.

Modification: The motion is granted as to Nos. 4, 36 and 37, limited to documents and emails relating to the items set forth in Request No. 37. Production shall be made by October 5, 2007. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-31-2007 Set For Trial On Dec-03-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Nov-14-07 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 503
